name: chess-engine
description: Modular chess engine with UCI protocol

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const {rimrafSync}=require('rimraf'); const ig=require('ignore')(); const root=require('child_process').execSync('git rev-parse --show-toplevel',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim(); ig.add(fs.readFileSync(path.join(root,'.gitignore'),'utf8')); const walk=d=>{for(const e of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){const p=path.join(d,e.name); const rel=path.relative(root,p); if(ig.ignores(rel)) rimrafSync(p); else if(e.isDirectory()) walk(p);} }; walk(process.cwd());"
